response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly with TypeScript, Node.js, and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools. While his AI-specific experience is slightly less extensive than the 8-year requirement, his leadership in developer tooling, cloud platforms, and open-source contributions suggests adaptability. His customer-facing and mentorship experience also aligns well with the role's technical-leadership responsibilities.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and full-stack development, including AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators).
Proven leadership in technical projects, mentorship, and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts).
Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS), data pipelines, and customer-facing technical roles.
concerns: AI-specific experience (8+ years) is not explicitly detailed; most roles emphasize general software development over GenAI.
Lacks explicit mention of vector databases or RAG architectures, though related skills (data pipelines, cloud) may compensate.
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or computer science, though this is a preferred qualification.
